title: paeonia × suffruticosa f. rosea
intro: Paeonia × suffruticosa f. rosea, also known as garden peony, is a type of flowering plant that is a cross between Paeonia suffruticosa and other peony species. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Paeonia × suffruticosa f. rosea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and menstrual cramps, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat a variety of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
